englishDefinitions: Stopped being a gunfighter or gave up fighting with guns.
Retired from a dangerous or violent job.
persianTranslation: از جنگ و درگیری دست کشید
examples: The old gunfighter hung up his guns and settled down on a ranch.
After years of fighting, he hung up his guns for good.
In the story, the sheriff hung up his guns and became a farmer.
